objective: Fix store-cli.cjs cmdEmit to normalize zeroed (T00:00:00Z) event timestamps to real wall-clock time and recompute durationMinutes.
key_changes: Add _isZeroedTimestamp() helper in CLI block to detect midnight-zeroed or absent timestamps
Add _normalizeEventTimestamps() helper that mutates event data in place before validation
Call _normalizeEventTimestamps(data) in cmdEmit canonical-event branch before schema validation
Add 4 regression tests in describe('store-cli.cjs — emit timestamp normalization (#56)')
